description_long: This is a compact, futuristic biofuel gas station dispenser with a robust, industrial design. The front features a digital display screen, control buttons, and a payment terminal, along with a hose and nozzle for dispensing fuel. The sides and rear are equipped with large, cylindrical biofuel tanks secured with metal bands, and the left side displays a prominent 'BIOFUEL' sign. The structure is primarily constructed from dark gray metal panels, with some lighter gray accents and a few visible vents and access panels. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. The object is designed to be a standalone fuel dispenser, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A compact, industrial biofuel gas station dispenser with digital controls, a hose, and large cylindrical fuel tanks, featuring a prominent 'BIOFUEL' sign.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, control buttons, payment terminal, and fuel hose with nozzle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'BIOFUEL' sign and reveals the cylindrical fuel tanks and hose connection.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full height of the cylindrical tanks and the back panel, with minimal controls or signage.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the structural support, access panel, and the side profile of the fuel tanks.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One modern biofuel pump integrated into the dispenser, with a single black hose and nozzle visible on the front. The pump features a digital display and control buttons, with a robust, industrial style and no visible branding on the pump itself.
attribute_station_signage: A large 'BIOFUEL' sign in white, mounted on the upper left side of the dispenser, with bold, futuristic lettering. No other signage or logos are visible.
